name: Cozze Al Vino Bianco (Mussels in a White Wine Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep skillet, cook the garlic cloves until golden in the olive oil.
2. Add onions and cook until wilted.
3. Add red pepper flakes, thyme, and white wine, then bring to a boil. Simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Add mussels and parsley. Cover tightly and cook over medium flame until shells open (approximately 3-5 minutes).
5. Add parsley, butter, and breadcrumbs. If the mussels do not have enough juice, add chicken stock. Bring all ingredients to a vigorous boil for 2 minutes, shaking the skillet well so everything mixes well.
Yield: 4 servings
